items.title: iOS code could reportedly let Apple cut off apps when users miss iPhone payments

items.title: AMD commits up to $5 billion to Anthropic
items.description: AMD says it's going to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic, while helping to expand the AI company's computing power, according to an announcement on Wednesday. As part of the new partnership, Anthropic will deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD's Instinct MI450 AI GPUs using the chipmaker's new Helios r...
